array_of_results_from_query_or_search: Array of results from query or search

describe_how_to_sort_e_g_by_name: Describe how to sort (e.g., "by name ascending", "newest first")...
describe_the_columns_properties_you_want: Describe the columns/properties you want (e.g., "name, status dropdown, due date, priority number")...
describe_the_content_you_want_to_add: Describe the content you want to add...
describe_the_content_you_want_to_create: Describe the content you want to create...
describe_the_row_data_e_g_name_is: Describe the row data (e.g., "name is Task 1, status is Done, priority is High")...
describe_what_the_database_will_track: Describe what the database will track...
describe_what_the_page_is_about: Describe what the page is about...
describe_what_you_want_to_filter_e_g: Describe what you want to filter (e.g., "status is done", "created after last week")...
describe_what_you_want_to_search_for: Describe what you want to search for...
enter_content_to_add_to_the_page: Enter content to add to the page
enter_database_properties_as_json_object: Enter database properties as JSON object
enter_row_properties_as_json_object: Enter row properties as JSON object
enter_search_terms_leave_empty_for_all_p: Enter search terms (leave empty for all pages)

filter_and_sort_a_notion_database_to_ret: Filter and sort a Notion database to return matching entries.
integrate_with_notion_into_the_workflow_: Integrate with Notion into the workflow. Can read page, read database, create page, create database, append content, query database, and search workspace.
metadata_containing_operation_specific_d: Metadata containing operation-specific details including page/database info, results, and pagination data
page_content_search_results_or_confirmat: Page content, search results, or confirmation messages
